original_image_tags: A blue rectangular sticker is adhered to the bottom right corner of the file folder cover.

elements.description: A white label with black text and a barcode. The text includes 'FBI - CENTRAL RECORDS CENTER', 'HQ - HEADQUARTERS', 'HQ-0000-86775B: HQ', 'Class / Case # 0062 83894', 'Sub', 'Vol. 1', 'Serial # 438 ONLY', '8/11/1274161', and 'RRP003IXG3' below the barcode. The label is affixed to an orange-brown folder.
A blue rectangular stamp with white text in the bottom right corner. The text reads: 'Declassification authority derived from FBI Automatic Declassification Guide, issued May 24, 2007.'

judge.reason: Description A describes a blue sticker with an identifier, while Description B describes a white label with extensive quoted text and a separate blue declassification stamp; the two descriptions are of completely different visual elements.
